task: Advanced high-value task: Medical Device Sbom Component Decision Boundary Test Plan. Scenario: a platform owner wants to convert ambiguous measurements into deterministic review actions for medical device sbom component. Embedded packet: Records: R1 CVSS=61 network_exposed=92 fix_available=2; R2 CVSS=70 network_exposed=88 fix_available=5; R3 CVSS=56 network_exposed=103 fix_available=1. Remediation options: O1 changes CVSS by -12% cost=87500; O2 changes network_exposed by -18% cost=102700; O3 changes fix_available by -25% cost=61300; max_budget=128400. Rules and constraints: network exposed and CVSS>=9 is critical; missing fix requires compensating control; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: perform a sensitivity check around the governing threshold and identify records whose classification is unstable. Deliver SBOM_risk_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
